form.formComment: Debutant by Barcia Bale from Fava Monelli. From the Sarah Fellowes kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

formComments.comment: Debutant by Barcia Bale from Fava Monelli. From the Sarah Fellowes kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 4th over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (18.55) behind Vivid Nightmare in a Maiden on April 6. Has the ability to be in the finish.

Checked off heels rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th in a Maiden on April 4 over 300m at this track behind My Julia beaten 15 lengths (18.76). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came togther then heels galloped on and lost momentum entering the first turn.
Hampered approaching the turn into the front straight.
Slow into stride; Was hampered and carried wide rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Yet to break through in nine runs, the latest effort a second over 407m at Rockhampton in 24.12. Can sneak into the finish.

formComments.comment: Yet to break through in nine runs, the latest effort a second over 407m at Rockhampton in 24.12. Can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest at double figure odds when second (16.40) over 272m at The Gardens. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

Checked off heels and shifted wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has only been in the placings once from eight starts. Last raced when seventh over 300m at this track a week ago. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Placed at all starts this track and trip. Latest effort finished 2nd on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Hollies Hayley beaten half a length (17.74) in a Maiden. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in 11 tries. Last start 5th over 300m at this track. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Maiden on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Hollies Hayley beaten 5.5 lengths (18.08). Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
